import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("UnitTest")
def test_UnitTest(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Tap Edit at (32.1%, 47.4%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'Edit', 32.1, 47.4, container_by=AppiumBy.XPATH, container_value='//XCUIElementTypeOther[@name="LauncherProViewController"]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView', container_w=320, container_h=539)
    with step("[Action] Tap btnBack at (56.7%, 56.7%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'btnBack', 56.7, 56.7)
    assert True
